BOOT_CUR_Register

CCR_Register

fields.name: CLR_CRCEND
fields.description:
Write-only. CRCRDERR1 flag clear bit Setting this bit to 1 resets to
0 CRCRDERR1 flag in FLASH_SR1 register.

record_types.name: CR_Register

fields.name: FW
fields.description: bank or sector erase start control bit

fields.name: EOPIE
fields.description: write protection error interrupt enable bit

fields.name: WRPERRIE
fields.description: programming sequence error interrupt enable bit

fields.name: OPERRIE
fields.description: read protection error interrupt enable bit

fields.name: RDSERRIE
fields.description: ECC single correction error interrupt enable bit

fields.name: SNECCERRIE
fields.description: ECC double detection error interrupt enable bit

fields.name: DBECCERRIE
fields.description: end of CRC calculation interrupt enable bit

fields.name: CRCENDIE
fields.description:
CRC read error interrupt enable bit When CRCRDERRIE1 bit is set to 1,
an interrupt is generated when a protected area (PCROP or
secure-only) has been detected during the last CRC computation on
bank 1. CRCRDERRIE1 can be programmed only when LOCK1 is cleared to
0.

record_types.name: SR_Register

fields.name: CRCEND
fields.description:
Read-only. CRC read error flag CRCRDERR1 flag is raised when a word
is found read protected during a CRC operation on bank 1. An
interrupt is generated if CRCRDIE1 and CRCEND1 are set to 1. Writing
1 to CLR_CRCRDERR1 bit in FLASH_CCR1 register clears CRCRDERR1. Note:
This flag is valid only when CRCEND1 bit is set to 1

Flash_Periph : aliased Flash_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => Flash_Base;
